description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slim build, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally. She has a straight, chin-length bob hairstyle and a defined facial structure. The figure is dressed in a cropped top and mid-thigh shorts, both fitted and simple in design, with no visible accessories or carried items. Her footwear consists of low-profile shoes that cover the feet completely. The model's limbs and joints are clearly segmented, giving a slightly geometric, low-poly appearance. The overall look is casual and modern, suitable for an urban pedestrian in a contemporary city environment.
description: A stylized adult female in a casual cropped top and shorts, standing with arms outstretched and wearing low-profile shoes. The figure has a geometric, low-poly appearance and a straight bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, cropped top, shorts, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight bob hairstyle, and the side contour of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the cropped top, and shorts, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the side outline of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual cropped top and mid-thigh shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
